name: igmarin/ruby-core-skills
description: Curated library of 16 public Ruby AI agent skills: 10 atomic skills (YARD docs, service objects, calculator pattern, API clients, DDD, bug triage, code review, skill routing), 5 process-discipline skills (TDD, refactoring, review, security, test planning), and 1 planning skill (TDD task generation). Zero agents — this is a foundational library consumed by framework-specific tiles like rails-agent-skills and hanakai-yaku.
